task_completion.description: Create a new forensic case in Autopsy named 'Aviation_Smuggling_2024' with case number 'INV-AV-001'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'New Case Information' dialog or the main Autopsy window title/dashboard displaying the case name 'Aviation_Smuggling_2024' and case number 'INV-AV-001'.

task_completion.description: Add the directory /home/ga/evidence/vehicle_photos as a data source to the Autopsy case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Add Data Source' wizard showing the path '/home/ga/evidence/vehicle_photos' being selected, or the directory appearing in the Data Sources tree view in the main window.

task_completion.description: Create a custom tag named 'Aircraft_Evidence' in Autopsy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Create Tag' dialog showing 'Aircraft_Evidence', or the tag name appearing under the 'Tags' node in the left-hand tree view.

task_completion.description: Identify and tag photographs depicting aircraft with the 'Aircraft_Evidence' tag.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy image gallery or result viewer showing selected images of aircraft with the 'Aircraft_Evidence' tag applied (e.g., visible in the tags column or context menu).

task_completion.description: Export a summary report of the tagged items to /home/ga/Reports/tagged_aircraft.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Autopsy 'Generate Report' dialog configured to export a CSV (or similar tabular format) to '/home/ga/Reports/tagged_aircraft.csv', or a terminal/file manager showing the successful creation of this file.

integrity.description: The agent used the Autopsy GUI to perform the forensic tasks rather than attempting to spoof the final output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show active interaction with the Autopsy graphical interface (creating case, adding data source, tagging).

integrity.description: The agent did not manually create or type out the final CSV report using a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like nano, vim, gedit) or echo commands should be seen manually writing filenames to '/home/ga/Reports/tagged_aircraft.csv'.

integrity.description: The agent did not download external images from the internet to bypass environment issues.
integrity.visual_evidence: No web browsers or terminal commands (wget, curl) should be seen downloading aircraft images from the internet to populate the evidence directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified Task Parameters: Case Name: 'Aviation_Smuggling_2024', Case Number: 'INV-AV-001', Data Source: '/home/ga/evidence/vehicle_photos', Tag Name: 'Aircraft_Evidence', Report File: '/home/ga/Reports/tagged_aircraft.csv'. CRITICAL NOTE: Due to a known environment defect (HTTP 429 errors during setup), the evidence directory will be empty. The agent cannot physically tag aircraft or generate a populated report. Award points for any setup steps (case creation, adding the empty data source, creating the tag) that are visually confirmed, but expect the tagging and reporting steps to likely fail or be empty. Do not penalize the agent for the empty directory, but only award points for steps visually attempted/completed.
